tasks: Build an M-LIM limiter plugin with full parity to FabFilter Pro-L 2 — functionality (all limiter algorithms, sidechain, channel linking, loudness metering, oversampling, lookahead, DC offset, dithering, true peak limiting) and visual/UI (real-time level meter, gain reduction display, loudness meter, algorithm selector, all controls). VST3/AU/CLAP plugin using JUCE framework. Reference docs mounted at /reference-docs.

Fix juce::FontOptions JUCE 7 API compatibility (blocks macOS build), productionize plugin for DAW usage (metadata, validation, lifecycle), add documentation (README, build instructions, DSP inline docs)

FULL UI AND VISUAL PARITY with FabFilter Pro-L 2. Reference screenshots are in /reference-docs/reference-screenshots/ and /reference-docs/video-frames/. Workers MUST build the plugin, launch it with Xvfb, take screenshots, and compare against the reference images to confirm visual parity. Spawn UI specialists to audit visual accuracy. Every visual element must match: color scheme (dark background, blue/cyan accents), knob styling and layout, algorithm selector button row, real-time waveform/metering display, level meters, gain reduction display, loudness panel, top bar, control strip, typography, spacing, and sizing. Workers should iterate until screenshots match the reference.

learnings: JUCE LTO builds take 20-30 min per target (Standalone, VST3, CLAP) — plan accordingly
ccache has 0% hit rate unless CCACHE_SLOPPINESS=pch_defines,time_macros,include_file_mtime,include_file_ctime is set — time_macros is critical
Build only Standalone target during dev iterations — cmake --build build --target MLIM_Standalone halves compile time
RMSE methodology: reference crop 1712x1073+97+32 then resize 900x500! (NOT full-image resize). M-LIM: scrot 1920x1080, crop 908x500+509+325, resize 900x500!
task-348 and task-350 RMSE results used WRONG reference (squished full image). task-354 is correct baseline: Full=22.08%
Top 20 rows of crop have structural ~13% floor (JUCE dark vs macOS chrome) — full-image RMSE cannot reach 15% target without platform match
Right panel (29.59%) stuck because idle meter looks same as text panel without audio playback — needs creative visual solution
Workers named swarm-20260325-mlim-worker-N (full run-id prefix), NOT swarm-mlim-worker-N
tail -f | head -N deadlock pattern: workers get stuck. Kill and respawn with docker rm -f
task numbering conflicts every sweep: UIParityAuditor + VisualParityAuditor create same-numbered tasks. PM always resolves.
Waveform grid alpha 0.6 is the correct value — reverting task-357 (0.35) brought waveform from 21.87% to 21.44%
Wave 15: task 365 warm gradient bled onto GR meter -> left RMSE 20.85%->28.11% regression. Fix: scope warm gradient only to input level meters, not GR meter.

Wave 16: Left 28.11% is a structural floor — the left meter crop (x=640-720) captures M-LIM TopBar (dark R=32) at y=0-35 vs Pro-L 2 bright level meter (R=123), and readout area (dark) vs bright meter bars. No histogram color change can fix this. Right panel improved to 23.57% by reducing level meter idle gradient top zone alpha 0.44→0.10 through warning boundary.
loudnessHistogramTop/Bottom constants are now decoupled from displayGradientTop/Bottom. Current values match displayGradient colors (0xff3A3540/0xff506090) which are optimal for left RMSE.

Left meter RMSE floor ~28% is structural: M-LIM JUCE TopBar (R=32) occupies y=0-35 of left crop vs Pro-L2 bright level meter bars (R=123). No color/gradient change can close this gap without audio playback.
Wave 18 final: Full=20.74%, Wave=18.96%, Left=29.00% (floor), Right=22.36%, Control=20.17%
Wave 20 final: Full=19.82%, Wave=17.29%, Left=28.75% (floor), Right=23.09% (regression from task-391 warm shift), Control=21.02% (regression from task-392 over-brightening). Full broke 20%!
Wave 21 final: Full=19.46%, Wave=16.72%, Left=28.71%, Right=23.09% (still regressed), Control=21.02% (still regressed). Waveform keeps improving. Right/Control need dedicated fix wave.
ccache defaults to /home/swarm/.cache/ccache (container-local, lost on exit). Must set CCACHE_DIR=/build-cache/ccache to use the shared build-cache volume.
extra_guidance: PRIORITY: Always pick tasks 421-429 first (visual parity tasks) over test/code tasks — these directly improve RMSE toward the 15% target. Only pick test tasks when no visual parity tasks remain. Use CORRECT RMSE methodology: reference crop prol2-main-ui.jpg -crop 1712x1073+97+32 +repage -resize 900x500!; M-LIM: scrot 1920x1080, crop 908x500+509+325, resize 900x500!. Correct baseline (task-354): Full=22.08%, Wave=20.55%, Left=23.50%, Right=29.59%, Control=22.42%. Build only Standalone for dev: cmake --build build --target MLIM_Standalone_Standalone -j$(nproc). Use ccache: cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache -DCCACHE_SLOPPINESS=pch_defines,time_macros,include_file_mtime,include_file_ctime. Tasks marked BLOCKED in pending/ should be treated as available — harness will unblock them. Do NOT rename task files to BLOCKED-* unless you have personally verified a hard git conflict that cannot be resolved. Set CCACHE_DIR=/build-cache/ccache so ccache persists across container restarts.
